title: bromus segetalis var. secalinus
intro: Bromus segetalis var. secalinus, also known as cheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bromus segetalis var. secalinus include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and indigestion, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Bromus segetalis var. secalinus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for medicinal purposes.
